generated_oml:
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngleDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance AngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of input current from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
]

instance AngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series data of output angle from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTTransport
]

instance MQTTTransport : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol implementation for streaming sensor data from physical to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based tool for system structure modeling and behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance MontiArcTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc tool for behavior modeling and architecture description"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehaviorSimulationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink tool for analytical modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AnalyticalSimulationService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for executing analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeExecutionService
]

instance JavaCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java compiler for executing analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeExecutionService
]

instance ACMETool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME-based Architecture Description Language tool for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureValidationService
]

instance AADLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL-based Architecture Description Language tool for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureValidationService
]

instance GeometricModelSysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation model using SysML Internal Block Diagrams for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance BehavioralModelSysMLStateMachines : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using SysML state machines (v1.7) for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcTool

instance AnalyticalModelJava : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance ComponentArchitectureACME : DTDFVocab:Model [

    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor component of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

    base:desc "Gear transmission component of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing the MABI MAX 100 robot physical components"

]

    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction occurs as the digital shadow is a passive entity that neither operates autonomously nor pushes data back to the physical system, consistent with the defined one-way data flow characteristic."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1) defines a component-based architecture where DataTrace components aggregate and abstract contextual data from Source entities (e.g., sensor streams), linked to physical Assets, with Processing components handling data transformation. The system operates as a one-way data flow from physical Asset to digital representation, structured via UML class diagram elements including DataTrace, Source, Asset, and Processing, with no autonomous feedback to the physical system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for transmitting sensor data between physical and digital components; no additional network topology, bandwidth, latency, or security details are specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with industry standards including SysML [17] for systems engineering modeling, AADL [24], ACME [23], and MontiArc [25, 26] for architecture description languages, and methodologies such as RFLP [18, 19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] for handling system complexity across abstraction levels. These standards ensure interoperability and structured development across requirements, functional, logical, and product/technical layers."
]
